Our Students are in the Finals at TEKNOFEST Izmir with “Tripy”!

The team named

Tripy

, formed by our students, became a finalist in the

Tourism Technologies

category of the Pre-Take Off event to be held within the scope of

TEKNOFEST Izmir.

The company idea named

Tripy

, which was successful in the

KHAS1724-S01-2022.2 Building Blocks of Entrepreneurship

course opened for the first time last semester within the scope of the Core Program and was selected among the top three ideas by Inveo Ventures investors at the end of the course, belongs to

, a student of our Computer Engineering department. Other students in the team are

Efe Tekin

and

Mehmet Ekin Ay

from the Computer Engineering department,

Zeren Safi

from the Advertising department, and

İrem Keser

from the Molecular Biology and Genetics department.

The project, which was put forward during a casual conversation about COVID-19 and its effects, emerged as a software-based idea that could benefit from the downturn in the tourism sector. We congratulate our students who made it to the finals with this “integrated” application idea called

Tripy

, where adventure-loving people can both socialize and design their vacation plan packages and list them on the marketplace, and we wish them continued success.

https://www.teknofest.org/tr/content/announcement/take-off-2023-icin-haziriz-sizi-bekliyoruz
